creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #3)

That's what is to be expected, when reading the diff-part only...

The only explanation was that there's a legitim altering of WRKDIR, which must have been the case for me.
Unfortunately I can't remember which port - but I'm quiet confident I checked that port in question if it's a port's fault...  bias was Mk/bsd.port.mk needs to be altered back then.

Don't want to waste your time, please close for now - any time I stumble across the failing port I'll re-open with a distinct example.

Thanks,
-harry
